summary: Phase C Community OS testing completed. Comprehensive backend API testing (20/21 passed) and frontend UI testing (3/3 passed) for public, holder, and admin flows. All core community features working correctly including ownership-gated access, sentiment tracking, polls, leaderboard, and admin moderation.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior - rate limiting is working correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Public summary endpoint (holders_count, sentiment, posts_count, open_polls)
Backend: Public feed endpoint (only public posts visible, can_see_lounge=false)
Backend: Public polls endpoint (weighted options with units and percent)
Backend: Public leaderboard endpoint (tier_label present)
Backend: Anon post blocked (401)
Backend: Anon vote blocked (401)
Backend: Holder summary (is_holder=true, units>0)
Backend: Holder feed includes lounge (can_see_lounge=true, discussion posts visible)
Backend: Holder post discussion (visibility=holders)
Backend: Holder post question (visibility=public)
Backend: Holder comment on post
Backend: Holder react to post (toggle like)
Backend: Holder set sentiment (my_sentiment + aggregated)
Backend: Holder vote on poll (my_vote + total_units updated)
Backend: Non-holder discussion blocked (403)
Backend: Admin announcement (notified holders)
Backend: Admin create poll
Backend: Admin close poll
Backend: Admin pin post
Frontend: Public view - Community tab renders with sentiment bar
Frontend: Public view - Sub-nav buttons (Feed, Lounge, Polls, Leaders) functional
Frontend: Public view - Feed shows public posts only
Frontend: Public view - Lounge locked for anonymous users
Frontend: Public view - Polls show weighted percentages
Frontend: Public view - Leaderboard renders
Frontend: Holder view - Mood selector visible and functional
Frontend: Holder view - Lounge unlocked with discussion composer
Frontend: Holder view - Successfully posted discussion
Frontend: Holder view - Successfully voted on poll with confirmation
Frontend: Admin view - Community tab renders
Frontend: Admin view - Announcement form functional
Frontend: Admin view - Poll form functional
Frontend: Admin view - Moderation list shows posts and polls
